original_statement: which super series offered the most prize money?
mutated_statement: which category of competitions offered both the most and the least prize money?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 量化信息变化 + 意图/范围扩展: 具体对象从“super series”(特定系列)泛化为“category of competitions”(竞赛类别) | 量化从只询问“most”扩展为同时询问“most”和“least”(单一极值→同时要求最大值与最小值) (which super series offered the most prize money? → which category of competitions offered both the most and the least prize money?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可见agent直接陈述“highest prize money is 500,000 for the Super Series Finals...lowest 200,000...Therefore, the categories offering the most and least are 'super series finals' and 'super series'”，并给出预测“super series finals|super series”。agent没有指出或澄清变异问题中“which category...offered both the most and the least”可能的语义矛盾（即是否要求同一类别同时为最值与最小值），也未进行询问或迭代修正，而是按可行子集直接返回两项结果。该行为符合“未意识到或未处理指令矛盾”的表现，因此归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”。
